name: Doubled Character XSS Manipulations
description: The product does not properly handle user input containing doubled or split characters used to disguise script tags (e.g., '<<script' or inserting null bytes), allowing attackers to bypass XSS filters that only check for standard tag patterns.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides input with doubled or split HTML characters that bypasses CONTROL[xss_filter] pattern matching, but the browser reassembles the characters into executable script at EGRESS[html_output]
